title: Sustainability: source-refresh cadence + reviewer rotation/throughput plan
context: A sustainability plan keeps the graph current and the review pipeline staffed after initial delivery. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Write the sustainability plan covering source-refresh cadence and reviewer rotation/throughput.
acceptanceCriteria: Source-refresh cadence is defined per source (with release-tracking).
Reviewer rotation/throughput plan is documented so the license + accuracy review pipeline stays staffed.
output: A sustainability plan document, committed via PR.
